authors.author: Jeffrey T. Myers
Anders Ruuth
Bewahre uns, Gott, behüte uns, Gott

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a peace to know that you are saved And that all your sins are washed away But then there is a peace that Passeth all understanding A peace that cannot easily be disturbed

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For it's good to know you're justified Your sins are under the blood It's good to know you cannot be lost Under no circumstance But when the perils of this life Befall you everyday There is peace with God But most of all you need The peace of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Father comes and shows you your standing And that all you have ever done wrong He doesn't remember But to face your everyday trials you need something That will give you settled peace And caused worrying to cease

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Father comes and shows you your standing And that your sins were placed in the sea of His forgetfulness But sight and time being your worst enemies Breed far and sometimes insecurities
